model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401896233) minutes before kickoff; prediction run on confirmed lineups. 18/22 player embeddings matched.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula gave EUR14 (cap-bound); user-directed downsize to EUR5 after a gut-check flag: a +12pp edge against a heavily favored, sharply-priced market (Qarabag 1.43 = 70% implied) is treated as a probable model blind spot (thin cross-league Elo for CSKA Sofia / Qarabag), not trusted value -- sized as a speculative poke, not a full-Kelly position.
Marginal edge (+1.2pp, +5.2% EV) -- below normal formula sizing, user-directed flat EUR2 speculative stake.

excluded_legs_note: Home win (Qarabag) explicitly excluded: model 48.6% vs 69.9% implied at 1.43 = -21.3pp edge, -30.5% EV -- a clear no-bet.
data_note: 18/22 player embeddings matched -- best-covered match of today's slate. Large away-side edge against a heavy home favorite flagged as a probable blind-spot pattern (same class noted after the Klaksvik loss, [[uefa-quals-coverage-2026-07-23]]); stakes downsized well below formula on that basis.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs (session artifacts); bet placed at Unibet around the 16:00Z kickoff; this commit logged minutes after kickoff, before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
